backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a per-user radio station favorites store using a Principal-keyed Map, with addFavorite, removeFavorite, and getFavorites endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two confirmed UI fixes: removing an unintended image in FullscreenOverlay and hiding conflicting text in GlobeView during globe mode.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Truncated JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, styling, and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based monochrome color tokens for both light and dark themes via CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Antenna PWA, loading Space Grotesk/Space Mono fonts, PWA meta tags, manifest, and ICP-hosted favicon/touch icon.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for the Antenna app defining name, dark theme colors, standalone display mode, and ICP-hosted icons at 256×256 and 512×512.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing view state (stations/favorites/globe), audio amplitude via Web Audio AnalyserNode, station queries with fallback sources, and layout switching between globe and standard stacked modes.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: App header component rendering the Antenna title, a search toggle button, and three view-tab buttons (Stations, Saved, Globe) with active state styling.
Canvas-based audio frequency bar visualizer that draws 20 monochrome bars from an AnalyserNode when active, or a flat idle line when inactive, with ResizeObserver-based canvas sizing.
frontend/src/components/BottomToolbar.ts: A fixed bottom toolbar component providing playback controls (play/pause/stop), volume slider with mute toggle, theme switcher, fullscreen toggle, and a popover menu with share and info options.
A Three.js-based 3D globe component rendered via React Three Fiber that displays an Earth with a marker at a radio station's geographic coordinates, adapting lighting and atmosphere to the current theme.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenOverla: A fullscreen overlay that shows the 3D globe background, an audio visualizer, station info, playback status, and rotating anti-subscription slogans; uses a wake lock to keep the screen on while open.
frontend/src/components/GaugeWidget.tsx: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/GlobeView.tsx: An interactive 3D globe built with Three.js and React Three Fiber that plots radio station locations as clickable points, supports hover tooltips, orbit controls, and theme-aware lighting.
frontend/src/components/HUDLayout.tsx: A minimal layout wrapper component that renders its children inside a full-height div with the app background color.
A compact now-playing panel displaying the current station name, playback/stream health status with animated indicators, an audio visualizer, and rotating anti-subscription slogans when no station is selected.
frontend/src/components/RadarWidget.tsx: A canvas-based animated radar widget that visually reflects radio playback state (playing, loading, paused, error) by modulating sweep speed, trail brightness, and blip rendering based on audio amplitude.
frontend/src/components/SearchPanel.tsx: A search UI panel for filtering radio stations by name, genre tag (with quick-select buttons), and country (with a filterable dropdown), triggering a search callback on input or Enter key.
frontend/src/components/StationList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of radio stations with play, favorite, and unfavorite actions, and handles loading, error, and empty states along with a banner indicating whether data is live, cached, or from a fallback source.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and removing favorite stations via the ICP backend actor, plus a utility function to convert API RadioStation objects to the backend Station type.
frontend/src/hooks/useRadioPlayer.ts: A React hook managing radio stream playback with an HTML Audio element and Web Audio API analyser, supporting play/pause/stop/volume control, automatic retry on stream failure, and stall detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom React hook that manages dark/light theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and toggles the 'light' CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: Custom React hook that requests a Screen Wake Lock API lock when enabled, releases it when disabled, and re-requests it on tab visibility change.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH CSS custom property palettes for dark and light themes, typography, scrollbar styling, and autofill overrides.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the App component.
frontend/src/services/radioBrowserApi.ts: Service module for fetching radio stations from the Radio Browser API with timeout handling, localStorage caching, and a hardcoded fallback list of popular global stations.
frontend/src/utils/geoMapping.ts: Utility module exporting a lookup table mapping country names to their approximate latitude/longitude coordinates.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Space Grotesk/Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, custom border radii, and accordion/fade-in animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing two existing fix features: removing an unintended image in fullscreen mode and hiding globe text in global/globe mode to avoid top-bar conflicts.
